nasb.text: But when we are judged, we are disciplined by the Lord so that we will not be condemned along with the world.

esv.text: But when we are judged by the Lord, we are disciplined so that we may not be condemned along with the world.

cnv.text: 然而我們被主審判的時候，是受他的管教，免得和世人一同被定罪。

ccb.text: 主审判我们，是对我们的管教，免得我们和世人一同被定罪。

csbs.text: 即使我们受惩罚，也是在受主的管教，免得我们和这世界一同被定罪。
